type.description: Type of the inquiry; needed only if it's exact behavior is established during integration process

attempt_reference.description: reference to the Profiling session, see attempt_reference

reference.description: Unique reference identifying this inquiry, as used in internal client's systems

force_accept.description: If set to true, the advice will be always 'accept', regardless of computed risk score

profiling_reference.description: It is a session identifier. If the field is null, information in the Panel Inquiry view will be limited. See profiling_reference

origin.description: Identifier of the interaction surface with the user, e.g. URL of the web form or identifier of the application screen that triggers the inquiry. Origin should be unique per use case and stay the same for each inquiry triggered by this use case.

merchant_reference.description: Reference identifying an account (MID - merchant id) in the gateway system, should be provided when handling multiple merchant accounts

merchant_name.description: Merchant corporate or parent company name

merchant_phone_number.description: Merchant phone number. Must be in E.164 format ("+" , up to 3-digits country code, up to 12-digits telephone number)

merchant_industry_category.description: The industry category of the merchant

merchant_mcc.description: The MCC (Merchant category code) of the merchant

merchant_timestamp.description: The timestamp can be provided if the end user's request was made prior to the inquiry to Nethone.

merchant_license.description: Information if the platform is EMI or PI (Electronic Money Institution or Payment Institution)

merchant_risk.description: Information whether the platform involves a certain level of risk

transaction_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code; must be provided when transaction_amount is provided

oneOf.title: string
oneOf.description: Transaction amount as decimal string. Only decimal string is allowed for cryptocurrency.

oneOf.title: integer
oneOf.description: Transaction amount as integer in the smallest possible unit according to ISO 4217. E.g. 1.99 USD = 199 (cents), 30 BRL = 3000 (centavos), 5 HUF = 500 (filler), 555 JPY = 555 (Yen), 44 BHD = 44000 (fils).

service_start.description: timestamp indicating a point in time when an inquiry related service should be considered as started; supported format is YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS+HH:MM; time zone info (+HH:MM) can be skipped in which case it is assumed that the value is in UTC

extra_data.description: Additional data associated with this Inquiry (limited to 4kB by default), typically information about the product (e.g. boarding pass information, cart content or loan application details).

user_reference.description: Use corresponding field in `customer` instead. Unique user identifier, see user_reference

user_first_name.description: Use corresponding field in `customer` instead. User first name

user_last_name.description: Use corresponding field in `customer` instead. User last name

user_phone.description: Use corresponding field in `customer` instead. User's phone number as string or its token

user_email.description: Use corresponding field in `customer` instead. User's email

user_ipaddr.description: Use corresponding field in `device` instead. User's IP address, without port number

user_agent.description: Use corresponding field in `device` instead. String identifying declared software used by the user, e.g. User-Agent header value from HTTP request

device_id.description: Use corresponding field in `device` instead. ID of the device used by the user (applicable for systems implementing their own device identification scheme)

card_token.description: Use corresponding field in `payment_methods` instead. Card token, see card_token

card_bin_number.description: Use corresponding field in `payment_methods` instead. Card BIN number as string of 6-9 digits

card_number_last4.description: Use corresponding field in `payment_methods` instead. Last four digits of credit card number

card_expiry_year.description: Use corresponding field in `payment_methods` instead. Card expiry year (as 4 digits number)

card_expiry_month.description: Use corresponding field in `payment_methods` instead. Card expiry month

cardholder_name.description: Use corresponding field in `payment_methods` instead. Cardholder's first and last name

affiliate_partner_reference.description: Use corresponding field in `source` instead. Reference of a related affiliate partner

affiliate_campaign_reference.description: Use corresponding field in `source` instead. Reference of a related affiliate campaign
